turns.content: I've failed my driving test five times. I'm going to take it a sixth time next month.
Five attempts takes real determination. What do you think the main challenge is?
Parallel parking. But I've been practicing two hours every day for the past month. I'm going to pass this time. I don't quit things.

notes: Strong perseverance in the face of repeated failure
